scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name '.next' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name '.turbo' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; rm -f bun.lock
scripts.db:push: cd packages/db && bun run --env-file ../../.env drizzle-kit push
scripts.db:generate: cd packages/db && bun run --env-file ../../.env drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && bun run --env-file ../../.env drizzle-kit migrate
